---
title: "06. 柔顺与养育"
subtitle: "Receptivity, Nourishment, and Gentle Cultivation"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 6
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How sparse-yang receptive hexagrams map return, nourishment, and gentle cultivation onto Fibonacci seeding, Zeckendorf sparsity, and GMS-valid growth."
---

**Hexagrams:** 师(7), 比(8), 临(19), 复(24), 颐(27), 晋(35), 明夷(36), 升(46)  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `Fibonacci growth`, `Zeckendorf representation`

{{< include articles/category_06_receptivity_nourishment_cultivation.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)


## Infographic

![category_06_receptivity_nourishment_cultivation Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_receptivity_nourishment_cultivation_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_receptivity_nourishment_cultivation_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_receptivity_nourishment_cultivation_infographic.png)
